title: nauclea dasyoneura
intro: Nauclea dasyoneura, also known as Kalamansi, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Nauclea dasyoneura include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be taken orally to harness its health benefits.
